access_key.description: The access key of the HuaweiCloudStack to use.

agency_domain_name.description: The name of domain who created the agency (Identity v3).

cert.description: A client certificate to authenticate with.

cloud.description: The endpoint of cloud provider, defaults to myhuaweicloud.com

delegated_project.description: The name of delegated project (Identity v3).

domain_id.description: The ID of the Domain to scope to.

domain_name.description: The name of the Domain to scope to.

endpoints.description: The custom endpoints used to override the default endpoint URL.

key.description: A client private key to authenticate with.

max_retries.description: How many times HTTP connection should be retried until giving up.

profile.description: The profile name as set in the shared config file.

project_id.description: The ID of the project to login with.

project_name.description: The name of the project to login with.

region.description: The HuaweiCloudStack region to connect to.

regional.description: Whether the service endpoints are regional

secret_key.description: The secret key of the HuaweiCloudStack to use.

security_token.description: The security token to authenticate with a temporary security credential.

shared_config_file.description: The path to the shared config file. If not set, the default is ~/.hcloud/config.json.

tenant_id.description: The ID of the Tenant (Identity v2) to login with.

tenant_name.description: The name of the Tenant (Identity v2) to login with.

token.description: Authentication token to use as an alternative to username/password.

agency_name.description: The name of agency for assume role.

domain_name.description: The name of domain for assume role.

description.description: Specifies the description of the AS policy.

operation.description: Specifies the operation to be performed. The default operation is ADD.

end_time.description: Specifies the end time of the scaling action triggered periodically.

launch_time.description: Specifies the time when the scaling action is triggered. The time format complies with UTC.

recurrence_value.description: Specifies the day when a periodic scaling action is triggered.

start_time.description: Specifies the start time of the scaling action triggered periodically.

delete_instances.description: Whether to delete instances when they are removed from the AS group.

health_periodic_audit_grace_period.description: The health check grace period for instances, in seconds.

health_periodic_audit_time.description: The health check period for instances, in minutes.

instances.description: The instances id list in the as group.

lb_listener_id.description: The system supports the binding of up to six ELB listeners, the IDs of which are separated using a comma.

notifications.description: schema: Deprecated; The notification mode has been canceled

events.description: Specifies the topic scene of AS group.

topic_urn.description: Specifies the unique topic URN of the SMN.

eni_subnet_id.description: the IPv4 subnet ID of the subnet where the ENI resides

postinstall.description: schema: Deprecated; This parameter can be configured in the 'extend_params' parameter.

preinstall.description: schema: Deprecated; This parameter can be configured in the 'extend_params' parameter.

Specifies the name of the record set. The name suffixed with a zone name, which is a
complete host name ended with a dot.

all_waf_instances.description: Specifies whether to enable global counting. Default to false.

block_page_type.description:
Specifies the type of the returned page.
The options are **application/json**, **text/html** and **text/xml**.

description.description: Specifies the description of WAF cc protection rule.

enterprise_project_id.description: Specifies the enterprise project ID of WAF cc protection rule.

limit_num.description:
Specifies the number of requests allowed from a web visitor in a rate limiting period.
The value ranges from 1 to 2,147,483,647.

limit_period.description: Specifies the rate limiting period. The value ranges from 1 to 3,600 in seconds.

lock_time.description:
Specifies the lock time for resuming normal page access after blocking can be set.
The value ranges from 0 to 65,535 in seconds.

name.description: Specifies the rule name of WAF cc protection rule.

page_content.description: Specifies the content of the returned page.

policy_id.description: Specifies the policy ID of WAF cc protection rule.

protective_action.description:
Specifies the protective action taken when the number of requests reaches the upper limit.
The value can be **captcha**, **block**, **log** or **dynamic_block**.

rate_limit_mode.description:
Specifies the rate limit mode.
Valid values are **ip**, **cookie**, **header**, **other**, **policy**, **domain**, **url**.

request_aggregation.description: Specifies whether to enable domain aggregation statistics. Default to false.

status.description: The status of a cc protection rule.

unlock_num.description: Specifies the allowable frequency. The value ranges from 0 to 2,147,483,647.

content.description: Specifies the content of the match condition.

field.description:
Specifies the field type.
The value can be **url**, **ip**, **ipv6**, **params**, **cookie**, **header** or **response_code**.

subfield.description: Specifies the subfield of the condition.

Specifies the advanced field. The following fields are supported:
**params**, **cookie**, **header**, **body** and **multipart**.
